author: Yoshihiro Yamazaki
message:
Make git2swf work before giflib-5.1.0. (#86)

* EGifCloseFile, DGifCloseFile API changed destructively in 5.10.
I want to work before 5.1.0.
ref) https://github.com/matthiaskramm/swftools/pull/2/files

* PrintGifError only works with ungif.
GifErrorString argument added in giflib-5.0.0

* refine space. hard tab to soft tab.

* update comment. ungif => libungif

author: Yoshihiro Yamazaki
message:
The print format types mismatch. (& little more fix) (#80)

* Remove warning by use of %td and %zd to printf ptrdiff_t and size_t objects respectively.

* Remove warnings by use of %p to print pointer values in printf().

* Fixed various lib/as3 warnings:
Redundant (and incorrect) casting from pointer to int when using %p in printf() format string.
Added correct anonymous union field name in struct initializera
Checked for fread() return value

* Use %t in printf() format string for printing ptrdiff_t values.

Co-authored-by: udif <github@udifink.com>

author: Yoshihiro Yamazaki
message:
Added support PlaceObject3 for swfcombine (#78)

* support PlaceObject3(swf8 & later) tag for swfcombine tool.

* fixing to PlaceObject2 parser for matrix/depth replacing.
 - depth field missing.
 - name field missing.
 - refine comment.

* eliminate unused variable(num)

* fixing to PlaceObject3 parser for matrix/depth replacing
- added another parser from PlaceObject2

author: Yoshihiro Yamazaki
message:
fixing to png_load vulnerability (#79)

* Add retval checking to the caller of png_load function. (png2swf, swfc)

* In png_load function, change error message output from stdout to stderr.

* Add retval checking to the caller of png_read_header function.

* fix memory leak in png_load function.

* Add retval checking to malloc in png_load function.

* * guard from redundant tRNS
tRNS chunk must be unique by PNG spec.
Multiple tRNS PNG occur memory leak as is it now.
A memory leak occurs when someone passes in multiple PNGs.

* fixing to possible heap overflow in tRNS palette copy.
in mode 0(grayscale) or 2(RGB)

author: よや
message:
Checking src->align non-zero (#77)

Avoid div 0 of align as denominator in samplelen calculation.
ref) https://github.com/matthiaskramm/swftools/issues/57

author: よや
message:
fixing to wav_convert2mono  dest->data heapoverflow bug & absence of caller error handling (#75)

* In wav_convert2mono, samplelen calculation round-up by src->align.
bug: Short estimate dest->size when src->size is not evenly divisible by align.
- https://github.com/matthiaskramm/swftools/issues/47

* checking to size & align as PCM sample criteria.
bugfix: PCM processor assume that align = channel * bps / 8, if a huge align is passed, the size of dest will be underestimated.
- https://github.com/matthiaskramm/swftools/issues/47

* Abnormal termination care when bps unsupported.

* Add caller handling when wav_convert2mono abnormally terminate.

author: よや

follow-up to https://github.com/matthiaskramm/swftools/pull/67

author: よや
message:
Strict Bpp verify checking for PNG specifications. (#72)

* Strict Bpp verify checking for PNG specifications.

* Correct the variable referenced in the error message. bpp & image mode

author: よや
message:
add TRUE/FALSE definitions to configure rules. (#67)

add TRUE, FALSE definition. (boolean and true, false should be set)

only boolean definition will confuse the jpeg header.

author: よや
message:
change rfx_alloc to rfx_calloc. (#71)

for Lossless RGBA, JPEG3 alpha zlib inflation buffer.

author: よや
message:
Solution suggestions for CVE-2017-16711 (#69)

https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2017-16711

Code modification to continue processing even if zlib infrate of image fails.

The current code returns 0(NULL) as an RGBA array when the zlib infrate of the image fails, so a segmentation fault occurs at the location that references it.

ref) https://github.com/matthiaskramm/swftools/issues/46

author: よや
message:
"Inline" should be prefixed with static/external modifier. (#66)

* INLINE => static INLINE

* adjust code style to around.
static INLINE int => INLINE static int

reference)
quantize.c:
  inline
  static ...
takehiro.c:
  inline static ...
